plugin_wifi.title: WiFi Drivers
plugin_wifi.description: Installs WLAN firmware and loads kernel modules for MOS. WLAN modules are already included in the MOS kernel – this plugin provides the required firmware.
plugin_wifi.deb_path_hint: Optional path to a local .deb file. If left empty, the package will be downloaded automatically from GitHub.
plugin_wifi.auto_download_hint: No path specified – the firmware package will be downloaded automatically from GitHub (mos-nas/mos-addon-drivers).
plugin_wifi.progress_note: The download may take 1–2 minutes depending on your connection. Please wait.
plugin_wifi.success_subtext: WLAN firmware successfully installed and modules loaded.
plugin_wifi.failed_subtext: Firmware package could not be installed. See the log for details.
plugin_wifi.timeout_subtext: The operation exceeded the time limit. Check your network connection or provide the package locally.
plugin_wifi.initial_prompt: Click "Install Drivers" to start the process.
plugin_wifi.driver_intel: Intel (iwlwifi + iwlmvm) – AX200, AX210, CNVi (coming soon)
plugin_wifi.driver_broadcom: Base wireless stack (cfg80211, mac80211) – built into kernel
plugin_wifi.driver_regulatory_database: Mediatek (mt7601u, mt76x2u, mt7921u) – e.g. COMFAST CF-953AX
